content: I'm an AI Data Engineer with 4+ years building distributed batch and real-time data pipelines that power analytics and machine learning workloads. I've shipped systems on AWS, Azure, and GCP using PySpark, Apache Spark, Kafka, and Airflow — moving from raw, messy sources into clean, queryable warehouses on Snowflake, Redshift, and BigQuery.

Lately I've been focused on the data layer that ML teams actually depend on: feature engineering pipelines, dataset versioning with MLflow, schema validation, and CDC-based ingestion that keeps things fresh without full reloads. I care a lot about reproducibility, data quality, and pipelines that don't wake people up at 3 AM.

highlights.title: Data Warehousing
highlights.description: Snowflake · Redshift · BigQuery with dimensional modeling and SQL tuning.

highlights.title: Streaming
highlights.description: Kafka + Spark Structured Streaming for real-time ingestion and ML monitoring.

highlights.title: Multi-Cloud
highlights.description: AWS, Azure, and GCP — Glue, Data Factory, BigQuery, Lambda, Synapse.

highlights.title: ML Data Layer
highlights.description: Feature engineering, MLflow tracking, dataset versioning for reproducible models.
